themes.label: Provision
themes.summary: This chapter emphasizes God’s supplying care, nourishment, sufficiency, or generous provision. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 4 verses. Commentary leans on "And out of the basket of unleavened bread, that was before the LORD, he took one unleavened c...". Word-study detail reinforces "לֶ֥חֶם: bread - food (for man or beast), especially bread, or grain (for making it)".

themes.label: Peace/Rest
themes.summary: This chapter offers peace, rest, stillness, comfort, or settled safety in God. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 2 verses. Commentary leans on "And he slew it; and Moses took the blood, and put it upon the horns of the altar round about...".

themes.label: Creation
themes.summary: This chapter underscores creation, the heavens and earth, or God’s creative ordering work. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 2 verses.
